stemHtml: Flights within NAT region shall be conducted in accordance with IFR when operating:

options.a: at or above FL60 or 2000 ft above ground whichever is the higher.
options.c: more than 50 NM seaward from the shoreline within any oceanic FIR.
options.d: more than 100 NM seaward from the shoreline within any oceanic FIR.
